name: web-modules-gh-pages-demo
description: Minimal demo built by `web-modules build` and deployed to GitHub Pages by .github/workflows/pages.yml — dogfoods the project's own GitHub Action. lit's sub-packages are listed explicitly because vendoring is not transitive: lit's own modules import `@lit/reactive-element`, `lit-html` and `lit-element` as bare specifiers, so each must be vendored to land in the import map.
